Who We Serve

Who Qualifies for Hospice?

Hospice care is available to patients of any age, religion, and race. Services are based on patient need. Admissions are never based on ability to pay.

General Eligibility Criteria

Hospice care is for patients who are terminally ill or have a life-threatening illness as determined by a physician. A patient is typically eligible when curative treatment is no longer desired or effective, and the focus shifts to comfort and quality of life.

A physician must certify that the patient has a life expectancy of six months or less if the illness runs its natural course. However, patients may continue receiving hospice care beyond six months if they continue to qualify.

Our Commitment

Admissions to Serene Hospice LLC are based on the patient's needs rather than the ability to pay. We serve all patients with equal dignity and compassion regardless of age, gender, race, ethnicity, nationality, disability, or religious beliefs.

Have Questions?

Our admissions team is here to help you determine if your loved one qualifies and guide you through every step of the process.

Common Diagnoses

Qualifying Conditions Include

The following are among the most common diagnoses, but many other conditions may qualify. Please contact us to discuss your specific situation.

🎗️

Cancer

All types and stages

🫀

Heart Disease

End-stage cardiac conditions

🫁

Lung Disease

End-stage pulmonary conditions

🧠

Dementia

Alzheimer's and neurological disease

🫘

Kidney Disease

End-stage renal conditions

🩺

Liver Disease

End-stage hepatic conditions

🦠

HIV / AIDS

Advanced-stage diagnoses

➕

And More

Contact us to discuss your situation
